untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identification of a specific chart pattern (handle) with evaluation of breakout position relative to 12-month high/low bands. This requires pattern recognition logic (detecting handle formation with 54 or 58-day length) that cannot be expressed using only price-based indicators and standard technical operators. The 12-month high/low reference and handle pattern detection are pattern-recognition features not available in the allowed indicator set. Entry conditions are context-dependent on prior pattern identification which must occur outside the rule engine.
translation_notes: Attempted to approximate using Donchian channels as a proxy for breakout detection (upper/lower bands), but this does not capture the handle pattern structure, handle length requirements (54/58 days), or the performance metrics conditional on breakout position (L/C/H zones). The varying success rates and decline percentages by handle length and breakout position cannot be encoded in rule conditions. Exit conditions marked AUTHOR_SILENT were replaced with reversal conditions. Volume trend also marked AUTHOR_SILENT and omitted.
